title: Forecast accuracy jumps 18 points after Stage 4 validation
anchor: Forecast-to-actual accuracy climbed from 58% to 76% across three forecast windows since the close-date validation rule went live April 17th.
connect: Commit tier deals show the strongest improvement in the new accuracy range.
body: Forecast-to-actual accuracy climbed from 58% to 76% across three forecast windows since the close-date validation rule went live April 17th. Commit tier deals show the strongest improvement in the new accuracy range.
trace: Stage 4 close-date validation rule deployment correlates with forecast accuracy improvement, particularly on commit-category deals.

title: Wednesday forecast call runs 62 minutes shorter
anchor: This week's call clocked 28 minutes versus the 90-minute average across the prior 8 weeks.
connect: Tuesday pipeline health report prep moved from manual to automated on April 21st.
body: This week's call clocked 28 minutes versus the 90-minute average across the prior 8 weeks. Tuesday pipeline health report prep moved from manual to automated on April 21st.
trace: Automated pipeline health report prep deployed April 21st correlates with dramatic forecast call efficiency gain.

title: Pipeline definition lock eliminates three-source variance
anchor: Sales, Marketing, and Finance reports now produce one matching number since the definition was adopted April 14th.
connect: Marketing-influenced and pipeline-sourced figures reconcile within 2%.
body: Sales, Marketing, and Finance reports now produce one matching number since the definition was adopted April 14th. Marketing-influenced and pipeline-sourced figures reconcile within 2%.
trace: Pipeline definition governance event resolved cross-functional reporting variance that was creating QBR disputes.

title: Stage 3 conversion rate climbs 15 points under new gate
anchor: Stage 3-to-Stage 4 conversion runs at 47% since the gate refresh deployed April 4th, up from 32%.
connect: The new gate requires confirmed champion and mutual action plan before deals advance.
body: Stage 3-to-Stage 4 conversion runs at 47% since the gate refresh deployed April 4th, up from 32%. The new gate requires confirmed champion and mutual action plan before deals advance.
trace: Stage 3 gate definition refresh with champion and action plan requirements shows material conversion improvement.

title: Lead routing exception rate drops to 1.8%
anchor: Manual routing exceptions hit 1.8% since the rule simplification deployed April 19th, down from 12%.
connect: Mid-market territory carve saw the largest improvement where four overlapping rules collapsed to one.
body: Manual routing exceptions hit 1.8% since the rule simplification deployed April 19th, down from 12%. Mid-market territory carve saw the largest improvement where four overlapping rules collapsed to one.
trace: Lead routing rule simplification in mid-market territory eliminated overlapping logic that was causing manual override volume.

title: Six redundant dashboards retired in consolidation audit

title: Stale close-date flag clears 92% of deals at entry gate
anchor: 247 deals flagged since the auto-flag rule deployed April 17th for close dates older than 30 days at Stage 3 and above.
connect: The rule replaces 90 minutes of weekly manual triage work.
body: 247 deals flagged since the auto-flag rule deployed April 17th for close dates older than 30 days at Stage 3 and above. The rule replaces 90 minutes of weekly manual triage work.
trace: Automated stale close-date detection eliminated manual weekly triage while maintaining high clearance rate.
